Home About Contact
Home About Contact

Since 2022

Built for Performance
— Driven by Detail

123 Mobile Detailing NJ was founded with one obsession: make every vehicle look, feel, and perform like it just rolled off the showroom floor — no matter its age or condition.

Contact Us (862) 500-5192

Our Story

123 Mobile Detailing NJ started in a driveway in Bergen County with a bucket, a microfiber towel, and an obsession for perfection. We realized that car owners in North Jersey deserved more than a quick wash — they deserved a precision detail experience that protects their investment and restores pride in their ride.

What began as weekend work for friends and family quickly grew by word-of-mouth. Today, we serve clients across Bergen County and Passaic County with a fully equipped mobile fleet. Our mission is simple:

Deliver showroom-quality detailing at your doorstep — with zero shortcuts, zero compromises.

Every vehicle we touch gets the same treatment: meticulous hand-wash, clay bar decontamination, machine polishing, ceramic protection, and a deep interior refresh. We don't stop until every panel, stitch, and vent meets our standard.

123
Mobile Detailing NJ

"Precision. Reliability. Convenience."

Convenience Redefined

Why Mobile Detailing?

We bring the detail shop to you — your home, office, or anywhere in Bergen & Passaic Counties.

We Come to You

No need to drop off your car or wait at a shop. We arrive at your driveway, parking lot, or office — fully equipped and ready to detail.

Save Your Time

We respect your schedule. While we detail your vehicle, you can work, relax, or take care of errands. Most details take 2–4 hours.

Premium Equipment

We carry pro-grade pressure washers, steam cleaners, polishers, and ceramic coatings — all in our mobile rig. Same quality as a fixed shop, delivered to your door.

No Shortcuts. Ever.

Our Commitment to Quality

01

Inspection

Every vehicle is fully assessed under proper lighting. We identify swirls, contaminants, and problem areas before we begin.

02

Prep

Hand-wash with pH-neutral soap, iron decon, clay bar treatment, and paint-grade prep before any polish or coating.

03

Correction

Multi-stage machine polishing using Rupes tools and fine-grade compounds. We remove defects, not clear coat.

04

Protection

Ceramic sealants, wax, or full ceramic coating applied with precision. Your paint stays protected for months.

Where We Operate

Service Area

We proudly serve all of Bergen County and Passaic County in New Jersey — from ridge tops to river towns.

  • Paramus
  • Hackensack
  • Ridgewood
  • Teaneck
  • Wayne
  • Paterson
  • Clifton
  • Passaic
  • Fort Lee
  • Englewood
  • Mahwah
  • Ringwood

Don't see your town? Call us — we probably cover it.

Bergen + Passaic
Covering all surrounding communities
Full Mobile Service

What Drives Us

Team Values

Precision

Every inch of your vehicle gets meticulous attention. We use proper techniques, calibrated tools, and a trained eye to deliver defect-free results.

Reliability

We show up on time, communicate clearly, and deliver what we promise. Our reputation is built on trust and consistency — job after job.
